text:
1. First, note that Asia/Shanghai is UTC + 8 and Europe/London is UTC ± 0.
2. Convert 5 PM (17:00) in Asia/Shanghai to UTC: 17:00 - 08:00 = 09:00.
3. Then convert from UTC to Europe/London time (which is the same as UTC in this case), so the time remains 09:00 on July 8, 1315.
FINAL_ANSWER: 09:00
